mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM b_board_skin_template WHERE 1=1 AND BST_DELETE = 'N'
AND BST_KEYNO = #{BST_KEYNO}

SELECT BST_TITLE, BST_KEYNO, BST_FORM ,BST_TYPE FROM b_board_skin_template WHERE BST_DELETE = 'N'
AND BST_TYPE = #{BST_TYPE}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO b_board_skin_template ( BST_KEYNO, BST_TITLE, BST_FORM, BST_REGDT, BST_REGNM, BST_TYPE )VALUES( BoardSkin.NEXTVAL, #{BST_TITLE}, #{BST_FORM}, SYSDATE, #{BST_REGNM}, #{BST_TYPE} )
mapper.update: UPDATE b_board_skin_template SET BST_DELETE = 'Y' WHERE BST_KEYNO = #{BST_KEYNO}
mapper.select: SELECT B.* , (SELECT BST_FORM FROM b_board_skin_template WHERE TO_CHAR(BST_KEYNO) = B.BSP_LIST_KEYNO) as BSP_LIST_FORM , (SELECT BST_FORM FROM b_board_skin_template WHERE TO_CHAR(BST_KEYNO) = B.BSP_DETAIL_KEYNO) as BSP_DETAIL_FORM , (SELECT BST_FORM FROM b_board_skin_template WHERE TO_CHAR(BST_KEYNO) = B.BSP_INSERT_KEYNO) as BSP_INSERT_FORM FROM b_board_skin_package B WHERE BSP_KEYNO = #{BSP_KEYNO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO b_board_skin_package ( BSP_KEYNO, BSP_TITLE, BSP_LIST_KEYNO, BSP_DETAIL_KEYNO, BSP_INSERT_KEYNO, BSP_REGNM, BSP_REGDT )VALUES( BoardSkinPa.NEXTVAL, #{BSP_TITLE}, #{BSP_LIST_KEYNO}, #{BSP_DETAIL_KEYNO}, #{BSP_INSERT_KEYNO}, #{BSP_REGNM}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE b_board_skin_package SET BSP_TITLE = #{BSP_TITLE}, BSP_LIST_KEYNO = #{BSP_LIST_KEYNO}, BSP_DETAIL_KEYNO = #{BSP_DETAIL_KEYNO}, BSP_INSERT_KEYNO = #{BSP_INSERT_KEYNO} WHERE BSP_KEYNO = #{BSP_KEYNO}
UPDATE b_board_skin_package SET BSP_DELETE = 'Y' WHERE BSP_KEYNO = #{BSP_KEYNO}
